{{Quote|He was a man who died with his dream unfulfilled... and his twin sister's been trying to fulfill it for him.|Leia Organa|<ref name="Comic" />}}
'''Denin''' was the [[Prince/Legends|prince]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naldar]], who led a native resistance to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Denin, who long dreamed of training as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Imperials who made Naldar a major gathering place after their climactic defeat in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Denin's consciousness passed on to the [[Netherworld of the Force/Legends|Netherworld of the Force]], where he met the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], who agreed to train Denin in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. However, Denin waited for the arrival of his twin sister [[Vila]], who posed as her brother in order to help bring an [[Alliance of Free Planets]] force to retake their world. Vila was killed in the fighting, and joined Denin in the afterlife to begin their training.<ref name="Comic" />
